audit_scope: All non-live dependencies in app/execlens-demo for the LENS V2 flagship surface

dependency_type_legend.STATIC_FIXTURE: in-memory data file imported at build time
dependency_type_legend.HARDCODED_SEMANTIC_VALUE: literal value in source code that should derive from upstream
dependency_type_legend.PRESENTATION_METADATA: labels / tier names / mode names that are presentation-layer constants
dependency_type_legend.MOCK_REPORT_OBJECT: an object shaped like a real report but populated with fixture values
dependency_type_legend.PROSE_DERIVED_VALUE: value extracted from authored prose for visual display
dependency_type_legend.SAFE_VISUAL_CONSTANT: constant used only for layout / styling, no semantic claim
dependency_type_legend.UNSAFE_FAKE_TELEMETRY: value pretending to be live runtime data — forbidden

dependencies.value_description: FLAGSHIP_REAL_REPORT object — full mock of a report with topology_scope (cluster_count=47, domain_count=3), evidence_blocks (3 fictional 'Primary Delivery' / 'Coordination Layer' / 'Secondary Delivery' domains), narrative_block (authored prose), trace_block, trace_linkage (synthetic hashes), rendering_metadata (Q-01, ALI-01..04)
dependencies.governance_risk: MEDIUM — fixture values do not match either FastAPI or BlueEdge vault data; commercial-evocative authored content
dependencies.notes: Single source of truth for surface content today. Replace via getServerSideProps fetching /api/lens-payload.

dependencies.value_description: FLAGSHIP_PROPAGATION_CHAINS array — 2 propagation chains using the same 3 fictional domain aliases
dependencies.replacement_source: Derived by SemanticPayloadResolver from binding_envelope.edges + signal_registry primary_entity traversal
dependencies.notes: Used for the demoted topology strip below the IntelligenceField.

dependencies.value_description: BALANCED hard-coded consequence statement: 'Pressure originates upstream and is being absorbed through the coordination layer; secondary delivery remains within bounds, advisory-qualified.'
dependencies.replacement_source: narrative_block.executive_summary from payload — but a generation rule for the consequence statement specifically may need a separate sentence-extraction adapter
dependencies.governance_risk: MEDIUM — currently authored prose with operational meaning
dependencies.notes: Out of scope for first binding; keep as authored prose until a narrative-generation contract is issued.

dependencies.value_description: DENSE hard-coded dense-note: 'Coordination layer is conducting upstream pressure rather than generating it — consistent with organizational stress migration, not isolated incident.'
dependencies.replacement_source: Could derive from absorption_load percentage + structural_summary in narrative_block
dependencies.notes: Authored prose for the cinematic surface; out of scope for first binding.

dependencies.value_description: DENSE hard-coded absorption percentage: 68% (in absorption-bar-fill style and in actor-absorption-meta-value)
dependencies.replacement_source: Computed from binding_envelope.edges (inbound coupling at PASS-THROUGH node) divided by total propagated load
dependencies.notes: The absorption metric needs a deterministic derivation rule per IFR-09 denominator_guard.

dependencies.value_description: INVESTIGATION lineage chain — currently reads from FLAGSHIP_REAL_REPORT.trace_linkage which is fixture-only
INVESTIGATION rule chips: Q-01 + ALI-01..04 — currently reads FLAGSHIP_REAL_REPORT.rendering_metadata.qualifier_rules_applied / ali_rules_applied
dependencies.replacement_source: rendering_metadata field — currently NOT in vault. Requires upstream contract to write rendering_metadata as a per-run vault artifact.
dependencies.governance_risk: MEDIUM — Inference Prohibition actor (N · IP) is BLOCKED_MISSING_ARTIFACT until this is addressed
dependencies.notes: First binding can ship with placeholder rule chips and a 'pending live binding' caption for IP only.

dependencies.value_description: BOARDROOM hard-coded statement: 'Operating posture. Pressure is propagating through coordination — advisory-bounded at the secondary receiver.'
dependencies.replacement_source: Could derive from narrative_block; out of scope for first binding
dependencies.notes: Authored prose for projection-grade boardroom statement.

dependencies.value_description: PRESSURE_META: HIGH/ELEVATED/MODERATE/LOW with color codes and symbols (e.g. HIGH=#ff6b6b, '▲')
dependencies.replacement_source: n/a — this is presentation metadata that maps tier names to colors
dependencies.notes: Safe presentation constant. The tier names themselves come from upstream.

dependencies.value_description: ROLE_META: ORIGIN/PASS_THROUGH/RECEIVER with color codes and symbols
STATE_LABELS: render_state → display label mapping (EXECUTIVE_READY, EXECUTIVE_READY_WITH_QUALIFIER, DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY, BLOCKED)

dependencies.notes: Persona-line microcopy and ARIA accessibility — safe.
Safe; the registry is a UI contract not a data dependency.

dependencies.value_description: INTERP_MODE_FRAMING constant (label / tone / section labels per lens)
REPORT_PACK_ARTIFACTS registry (4 entries with future binding_path placeholders)
dependencies.replacement_source: Live binding paths injected by /api/report-pack at the support-rail level
dependencies.notes: Path templates are safe; live binding wires actual file resolution.

dependencies.value_description: Top-level FLAGSHIP_REAL_REPORT import via require() in source — flagship_real_report.fixture acts as the entire 'report object' shape
dependencies.notes: Removing the require() and replacing with payload fetch is the central code change for the binding implementation contract.

dependencies.value_description: Other fixtures: flagship_blocked, flagship_diagnostic, flagship_executive_ready, flagship_q01, flagship_q02, flagship_topology_safe, flagship_boardroom_mode, flagship_investigation_flow, flagship_operational_canvas, flagship_forbidden_*
dependencies.replacement_source: n/a — these are test fixtures for adapter / orchestration tests; they remain the test substrate even after live binding lands
dependencies.notes: These fixtures support unit tests for the orchestration / adapter logic and should be preserved.

dependencies.value_description: orchestrateFlagshipExperience() function takes the in-memory report object and adapts it for rendering
dependencies.replacement_source: Live payload from /api/lens-payload should be byte-compatible with the input shape this function expects, so this function is preserved as-is
dependencies.notes: Stable contract surface. Live payload must conform to the input shape.

summary.blocked_reason: rendering_metadata not yet written as a per-run vault artifact

first_binding_replacement_priority_order: 1. Replace require() of flagship_real_report.fixture in lens-v2-flagship.js with getServerSideProps fetching /api/lens-payload
2. Implement /api/lens-payload backed by SemanticPayloadResolver reading FastAPI run_02 artifacts
3. Implement /api/report-pack returning static HTML for the four canonical report artifacts
4. Compute absorption percentage (currently 68%) from binding_envelope.edges deterministically
5. Compute trace_linkage hashes from vault/evidence_trace + vault_manifest + run_initialization_manifest
6. Compute qualifier_class from grounding_state_v3.grounding_ratio per derivation rule §3.1 of mapping matrix
7. Document Inference Prohibition (N · IP) as still partially fixture-derived until rendering_metadata is vault-written
